sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, date '1992-02-15');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = date '2023-10-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, timezone_minute(event_date) AS timezone_offset FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
